channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-57760 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Sendcloud Shipping plugin <= 1.0.29 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Sendcloud Sendcloud Shipping allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Sendcloud Shipping: from n/a through 1.0.29.

item.title: CVE-2026-57678 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Slider Revolution plugin 7.0.0-7.0.16 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in ThemePunch Slider Revolution allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects Slider Revolution: from 7.0.0 through 7.0.16.

item.title: CVE-2026-56037 · 8.8 HIGH — WordPress Themify Popup plugin <= 1.4.3 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in Themify Themify Popup allows Object Injection. This issue affects Themify Popup: from n/a through 1.4.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-57766 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WPIDE – File Manager & Code Editor plugin <= 3.5.6 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in WPIDE – File Manager & Code Editor <= 3.5.6 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57765 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress WP EasyCart plugin <= 5.9.0 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Contributor SQL Injection in WP EasyCart <= 5.9.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57764 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Surbma | Yoast SEO Breadcrumb Shortcode plugin <= 1.2 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Surbma | Yoast SEO Breadcrumb Shortcode <= 1.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57763 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Structured Content plugin <= 1.7.0 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Contributor Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Structured Content <= 1.7.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57762 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Simple URLs plugin <= 151 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Author Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Simple URLs <= 151 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57761 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress SEOWP theme <= 3.12.2 - CSRF to Stored XSS vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in SEOWP <= 3.12.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57759 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress ProfileGrid plugin <= 5.9.9.7 - CSRF to Account Takeover vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in ProfileGrid <= 5.9.9.7 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57758 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Permalink Manager for WooCommerce plugin <= 1.0.8.2 - CSRF to Stored XSS vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Permalink Manager for WooCommerce <= 1.0.8.2 versions.

item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in pCloud WP Backup <= 2.0.2 versions.

item.description: Contributor SQL Injection in nicen-localize-image <= 1.4.9 versions.

item.description: Contributor Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Mosaic Gallery – Advanced Gallery <= 1.2.0 versions.
